title: MagicEdenCollection
description: A Magic Eden NFT collection with marketplace statistics and metadata.

symbol.description: Unique collection symbol identifier on Magic Eden.

image.description: URL to the collection's cover image.

chain.description: Blockchain on which the collection lives.

floorPrice.description: Current floor price of the collection in lamports (Solana) or wei (EVM).

listedCount.description: Number of NFTs currently listed for sale.

volumeAll.description: All-time trading volume for the collection.

avgPrice24hr.description: Average sale price over the past 24 hours.

volume24hr.description: Trading volume over the past 24 hours.

holders.description: Number of unique wallet addresses holding at least one NFT from this collection.

totalItems.description: Total number of items (minted supply) in the collection.

categories.description: Category tags associated with the collection.

isVerified.description: Whether the collection has been verified by Magic Eden.

hasAllItems.description: Whether all items in the collection are indexed by Magic Eden.

website.description: Official website URL for the collection.

discord.description: Discord invite URL for the collection community.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the collection was created on Magic Eden.
